### [ F54 Application for registration of a maintenance order in the family court – procedure in the family court E+W


32.15A. — (1) This rule applies where the court officer for the family court receives from the court officer of the High Court a certified copy of a High Court order, in accordance with section 2(2)(b) of the 1958 Act.


(2) The court officer of the family court will—

### Registration in [ F55 the family court ] of an order registered in the High Court [ F56 - procedure in the High Court ] E+W


32.16. —(1) This rule applies where—


(2) The court officer [ F59 of the High Court ] must enter particulars of the registration in F60 ... the register.
